description: Style NoteKnown for its contemporary touch to traditional Indian wear aurelia does not dissapoint with this sea green kurta with geometric weave detail. Its pure cotton composition keeps you feeling comfortable all day long. Pair it with a dark blue churidar and embellished sandals for a casual yet chic ensemble.Product DetailsKnee length sea green kurta with geometric weave detail at neck and cuffs, short sleeves, round neck with split neckline, silver shank buttons and a vented hemMaterial and care100% cottonMachine wash with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleachDry in shade inside outWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8''and chest 33'') is wearing a size M
